scoringPlays.text: Coleman Bennett 3 Yd Run (Britton Williams Kick)
Cam Cook 1 Yd Run (Garrison Rippa Kick)
Caden Creel 19 Yd Run (Caden Creel Pass to Deondre Johnson for Two-Point Conversion)
Navelle Dean 11 Yd pass from Amari Odom (Britton Williams Kick)

videos.headline: Kennesaw State wins Conference USA on TD in final minute
videos.description: Down in the final minutes, Amari Odom finds Navelle Dean for the go-ahead touchdown, and Kennesaw State defeats Jacksonville State to win Conference USA title.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kennesaw State wins Conference USA on TD in final minute) 2025/12/06 ESHEET
